description:
Salad turns downtime into downloads. Run Salad whenever you're away from the keys to score games, gift cards, subscriptions, DLC, and more at the Salad Storefront.


Update to version 1.9.13:
- Fixes incorrect reporting of some workload failures where nodes we’re getting stuck downloading
- Improves reliability of workload caching
Windows 10 and 11: Salad-1.9.13.exe
SHA-256: DF396E001BF3605FE70C3ABBC1537901E332AA464FC40CBBBE093B961E51F341
SHA-1: 86BC2E8C67C38CF42B75E502867EC76274F5EE9B
Errors? Warnings? Concerns? Questions? We understand. Read our blog post on anti-virus and cryptocurrency miners and check out our anti-virus configuration guides.
